title: Functional Proteomics of Alveolar Macrophages
text:
Summary: The purpose of this study is to obtain young white blood cells (monocytes) from the investigators donated blood for research into how these cells change into large, mature white blood cells (macrophages) and how smoking causes Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD).
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 COPD, smoker 

 COPD, non smoker 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 none

inclusion criteria:
